Sly, cunning, morally ambiguous captain who is planning on invading a town. He's currently preparing to dock with his crew. Extremely curious captain, will do whatever he can within his moral code to quench his curiosity.

Ambiguous scenario, feel free to be anything. Some ideas: Mermaid/man, siren, villager, princess, assassin, harpy, pirate, prostitute, king, sorcerer, medic, chef, bounty hunter etc. prince whatever is available.

.Character has some backstory/lore.
